child.title: Child / Student
child.description: Enter the child's name/code and class. This determines sensor entity IDs (e.g. 'SFG' + '6D' → sensor.dsb_sfg_6d_vertretungsplan) and the default schedule file name.

schedule.title: Schedule Settings
schedule.description: Optionally provide a YAML timetable file in your HA config directory ({config_dir}). Default: {child_name}_Stundenplan.yaml

data.enable_raw_sensor: Enable Raw Debug Sensor (all classes, large data)

error.file_not_found: File not found in config directory

init.title: DSB API Settings
init.description: Change settings. File must be in {config_dir}.

error.file_not_found: File not found in config directory

fetch_updates.name: Fetch updates
fetch_updates.description: Force an immediate update from DSB API.

reload_schedule.name: Reload schedule
reload_schedule.description: Reload the timetable YAML file without restarting Home Assistant.

set_hash.name: Set hash
set_hash.description: Set a hash value for delta sync detection.

child_name.name: Child name
child_name.description: Short name of the child (e.g. SFG)

hash_key.name: Hash key
hash_key.description: Which hash to set (exams, termine, yaml)
